data.content:
## Implementation Plan — strip project prefix from displayed aliases

### Problem
Hierarchical aliases currently display with the project prefix, e.g. `knots-19dc.1.2`. The prefix should be stripped for *display only* (rendered short-id already appears in parentheses, so the prefix is redundant noise). Internal alias resolution is unaffected.

### Invariants respected
- `AliasMaps` storage unchanged → `resolve_knot_token` (`src/app/alias.rs:43`) and `resolve_knot_suffix` (`src/app/alias.rs:139`) continue to accept both full aliases and stripped suffixes.
- `build_alias_maps` (`src/hierarchy_alias.rs`) NOT modified.
- JSON output (`--json`) continues to emit the full alias — machine-readable contract preserved.
- `matches_query` (`src/listing.rs:144`) still substring-matches the full alias, so stripped-form queries continue to work.

### Design
Add `display_alias(&str) -> &str` in `src/knot_id.rs`:
```rust
pub fn display_alias(alias: &str) -> &str {
    alias.rsplit_once('-').map_or(alias, |(_, suffix)| suffix)
}
```
Semantics mirror the existing `display_id` (rsplit on last `-`) but are alias-specific for readability at call sites. Handles:
- `knots-abc1` → `abc1`
- `knots-abc1.1.2` → `abc1.1.2`
- `my-repo-abc1.1` → `abc1.1` (last hyphen is the boundary)
- `abc1.1` (no hyphen) → `abc1.1` (safe no-op)

### Call-site changes
| File | Location | Change |
|------|----------|--------|
| `src/knot_id.rs` | new public fn + unit tests | add `display_alias` |
| `src/ui.rs` | `format_knot_row` lines 95-117 | wrap `a` in `display_alias(a)` |
| `src/ui.rs` | `knot_show_fields` lines 211-214 | push `display_alias(a)` into `alias` field |
| `src/poll_claim/ready.rs` | lines 29-33 | wrap `a` in `display_alias(a)` |
| `src/profile_commands.rs` | lines 221-225 | wrap `alias` in `display_alias(alias)` |

### Test strategy
1. Unit tests in `src/knot_id.rs`:
   - strips prefix from root alias
   - strips prefix from deep hierarchy (`.1.2.3`)
   - handles multi-hyphen prefix (last `-` is boundary)
   - passes through input without hyphens
2. `src/ui_tests_ext.rs` additions:
   - Existing `A.1` test still passes (no hyphen → no-op). Add test that uses `knots-19dc.1` and asserts rendered row contains `19dc.1 (...)` and NOT `knots-19dc.1`.
   - `knot_show_fields` test asserting the `alias` field is stripped.
3. Small unit coverage for the ready-queue and profile-set format strings (prefer extracting a tiny helper if convenient, else assert constructed strings inline).
4. Manual verification post-build: `./target/debug/knots ls`, `./target/debug/knots show knots-9530`, `./target/debug/knots ready`.

### Complexity & risk
- Complexity: LOW — ~1 helper, 4 call-site edits, ~6 tests.
- R1 (Low): alias without `-` → rsplit_once returns None → original string returned (safe no-op).
- R2 (Low): JSON consumers — NOT touched; JSON emits full alias as before.
- R3 (Low): coverage ratchet — helper + call-site tests keep coverage at/above threshold.

### Rollout
Single feature branch, `make sanity` before push, merge to main. No feature flag needed; change is display-only.

### Acceptance self-check
- [x] Actionable steps with clear deliverables
- [x] Complexity assessment: Low
- [x] Dependencies & risks identified (R1-R3)
- [x] Test strategy covers unit + display + manual
- [x] All invariants respected (resolver, JSON, coverage)
